anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown binds anti-principle authoring to std_microcosm_anti_principle, the anti-principle doctrine kind, and the executable doctrine grammar mechanism because failure-mode rejection must be admitted through source text, guarded axioms, and computed boundaries rather than inferred from generated projections.

Skill source mapping names this mechanism as an operational dependency.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown binds anti-principle authoring to std_microcosm_anti_principle, the anti-principle doctrine kind, and the executable doctrine grammar mechanism because failure-mode rejection must be admitted through source text, guarded axioms, and computed boundaries rather than inferred from generated projections.

title: Microcosm Anti-Principle Author
triggers: A repeated failure mode needs governed anti-principle admission rather than remaining broad warning prose.
The agent can name source text, guarded axioms, failed-principle separation, support boundary, and residual pressure for any unproven negation edge.
workflow: Read std_microcosm_anti_principle, ANTI_PRINCIPLES.md, guarded axiom refs, principle obligations, relation registry, and generated health before editing.
Admit only source-backed anti-principle rows or typed residual pressure; keep anti-axiom rejection separate from positive axiom or principle support.
Regenerate the anti-principle corpus and doctrine lattice, then run anti-principle, axiom, principle, standard, and broad projection checks before scoped commit.
